# Vambrace

## Observed Text

- The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with high-base first block cards such as Defend+, True Grit, Armaments, and Colossus; sequence the best block card first when practical.
